verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What can I say That You have never heard What can I offer You And where can I go That You have never been That You can't lead me through Take my hand Hear this cry Only You can satisfy

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Fall down on me Drop me to my knees Pour over me I'm deeper than the sea Rain on me With a love, until I drown I need You to fall down

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Well if I had one place Just one place to be Well, I'd be at Your feet And if I had one prayer I know that I'dpray I'd ask You to fall down on me Take my hand Hear this cry Only You can satisfy

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Fall down on me Drop me to my knees Pour over me I'm deeper than the sea Rain on me With a love, until I drown I need you to fall down

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Take my words Hear this cry Only You can satisfy Fall down on me Drop me to my knees Pour over me I'm deeper than the sea Rain on me With a love, until I drown I need you to fall down
